EDUC - Education

EDUC386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education; and junior standing or higher.

EDUC388 Special Topics in Education (3 Credits) Restriction: Permission of EDUC-College of Education. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
